entity.name: StockLocation
entity.decimal: SELECT COALESCE(SUM(history.qty * CASE WHEN cfg.stock_valuation_type_select = 1 THEN CASE WHEN EXISTS( SELECT 1 FROM studio_app_base_company_specific_product_fields_set cpf LEFT JOIN meta_field mf ON mf.id = cpf.company_specific_product_fields_set WHERE mf.name = 'avgPrice' ) THEN COALESCE( (SELECT pc.avg_price FROM base_product pc WHERE pc.company = loc.company AND pc.product = sll.product), p.avg_price ) ELSE p.avg_price END WHEN cfg.stock_valuation_type_select = 2 THEN history.cost_price WHEN cfg.stock_valuation_type_select = 3 THEN history.sale_price WHEN cfg.stock_valuation_type_select = 4 THEN CASE WHEN EXISTS( SELECT 1 FROM studio_app_base_company_specific_product_fields_set cpf LEFT JOIN meta_field mf ON mf.id = cpf.company_specific_product_fields_set WHERE mf.name = 'lastPurchasePrice' ) THEN COALESCE( (SELECT pc.last_purchase_price FROM base_product pc WHERE pc.company = loc.company AND pc.product = sll.product), p.last_purchase_price ) ELSE p.last_purchase_price END WHEN cfg.stock_valuation_type_select = 5 THEN history.wap ELSE sll.avg_price END ), 0) FROM stock_stock_location_line sll LEFT JOIN stock_stock_location_line_history history ON history.stock_location_line = sll.id AND history.datet = ( SELECT MAX(h2.datet) FROM stock_stock_location_line_history h2 WHERE h2.stock_location_line = sll.id ) LEFT JOIN stock_stock_location loc ON loc.id = sll.stock_location LEFT JOIN base_product p ON p.id = sll.product LEFT JOIN stock_stock_config cfg ON cfg.company = loc.company WHERE sll.stock_location = id AND history.qty != 0
